module.name: Gate
module.origin:
ISP Decimator
Ampero Name: Smart Gate
module.descriptionCn:
基于著名的ISP®Decimator™*噪音门单块。独创的“时间适量”技术来处理输入信号，能够对于信号进行几乎同步的反应并且对于低强度信号有着更加敏锐的响应。这使它具有极其自然的尾音，以及对原始音色的损失降低到最低。

THRE：调节噪音门的触发阈值

*文中所提到的厂商及产品名称仅用于直观说明该产品的效果与音色特性，商标名称归其公司所有。
module.descriptionEn:
Based on famous ISP®Decimator™* noise gate pedal. The Decimator features improvements in the expander tracking with their new Linearized Time Vector Processing™. This novel improvement provides a more linear release time-constant response for the exponential release curve of the downward expander. 

THRE: Controls the gate trigger level 

*The mentioned manufacturers and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of the respective owners. The trademarks were used merely to identify the sound character of this product.
module.summaryEn: Based on ISP®Decimator™* noise gate pedal.

module.name: COMP
module.descriptionCn:
声音基于传奇的Ross™ Compressor压缩效果器音色。这是吉他压缩效果器的鼻祖，是它把吉他压缩效果带入大众并成为日后不可或缺的重要元素，它拥有十分自然圆润的压缩效果，能够有效增强吉他的延音。

Sustain：调节压缩量
VOL：调节效果输出音量

*文中所提到的厂商及产品名称仅用于直观说明该产品的效果与音色特性，商标名称归其公司所有。
module.descriptionEn:
Based on the legendary Ross™ Compressor. This is the originator of the guitar compression effect. It brings the guitar compression effect to the public and becomes an important element in the future. It has a very natural and mellow compression effect.

Sustain: Controls the compression amount
VOL: Controls the effect output

*The mentioned manufacturers and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of the respective owners. The trademarks were used merely to identify the sound character of this product.

module.name: COMP4
module.descriptionCn:
声音基于著名的Keeley® compressor*压缩效果器音色一款发烧级压缩效果器。分明的层次感，精确适量的高频让你的吉他听起来更清亮。

Sustain：调节效果的压缩量
Attack：调节压缩效果器多久开始处理声音信号
VOL：调节效果的输出音量
Clipping：调节输入灵敏度

*文中所提到的厂商及产品名称仅用于直观说明该产品的效果与音色特性，商标名称归其公司所有。
module.descriptionEn:
Based on the Keeley ® C4 4-knob compressor*. A recording studio - level compression effect. Clear sense of hierarchy, the right amount of high frequency makes your guitar sound brighter.

Sustain: Controls the compression amount
Attack: Controls how soon the compressor starts to process the signal 
Volume: Controls the effect output 
Clipping: Controls the input sensitivity 

*The mentioned manufacturers and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of the respective owners. The trademarks were used merely to identify the sound character of this product.

module.name: Boost
module.descriptionCn:
声音基于著名的Xotic®EP Booster*激励效果器音色。提供+20dB的纯净激励提升，结实的低频，明亮的高频，使清音更加悦耳。

Gain：控制效果增益量/输出音量
+3dB：选择最小增益是0dB还是+3dB
Bright：打开以增加额外的高频，关闭以保持平直频响

*文中所提到的厂商及产品名称仅用于直观说明该产品的效果与音色特性，商标名称归其公司所有。
module.descriptionEn:
Based on famous Xotic® EP Booster* pedal. Provides +20DB of pure stimulation lift, strong low frequency, bright high frequency, making clear sound more pleasant.

Gain: Controls the effect output/boost amount
+3dB: Selects the minimum boost amount from 0dB (off) to +3dB (on)
Bright: Selects the sound character from vintage (Bright off) to flat (Bright on)

*The mentioned manufacturers and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of the respective owners. The trademarks were used merely to identify the sound character of this product.
module.summaryEn: Based on Xotic® EP Booster* pedal.

module.name: Micro Boost
module.descriptionCn:
基于MXR® M133 Micro Amp*经典激励单块建模。它有着最⼤20dB的增益量，可以在有效提升输出信号幅度的同时不改变原始音色风味。

Gain：控制效果增益量/输出音量

*文中所提到的厂商及产品名称仅用于直观说明该产品的效果与音色特性，商标名称归其公司所有。
module.descriptionEn:
Based on the legendary MXR® M133 Micro Amp2 pedal. Providing up to 20dB of gain, the Micro Boost elevates your amp sound without changing its tonal character.

Gain: Controls the gain amount

*The mentioned manufacturers and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of the respective owners. The trademarks were used merely to identify the sound character of this product.
module.summaryCn: 基于MXR® M133 Micro Amp*激励单块。
module.summaryEn: Based on MXR® M133 Micro Amp* pedal.

module.name: B-Boost
module.descriptionCn:
任何吉他手都可以从Xotic®BB Preamp*过载效果器中受益。它可以很好地产生厚重和奶油般的过载音色，并具有出色的延音效果，提供高达30dB的激励效果。

Gain：控制效果增益量
VOL：调节输出音量
Bass：调节低频
Treble：调节高频

*文中所提到的厂商及产品名称仅用于直观说明该产品的效果与音色特性，商标名称归其公司所有。
module.descriptionEn:
Any guitarist can benefit from the Xotic® BB Preamp* overdrive pedal. The pedal works equally well for getting thick and creamy overdrive tones with great sustain as it does for pushing the clean front end of an already driven amp with up to 30dB of boost. 

Gain: Controls the distortion amount 
VOL: Controls the effect output 
Bass/Treble: 2-band EQ that controls the effect tone

*The mentioned manufacturers and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of the respective owners. The trademarks were used merely to identify the sound character of this product.
module.summaryEn: Based on Xotic® BB Preamp* pedal.

module.name: Toucher
module.descriptionCn:
通过演奏力度控制哇音音色。具有宽广调节范围的包络滤波器（Touch Wah）效果，极高的敏锐度，能够快速的捕捉你的弹奏，随着演奏⼒度的强弱⽽变化；提供吉他模式和贝斯模式两种可选。

Sense：调节灵敏度，参数值越高灵敏度越高
Range：调节哇音滤波器中心频率
Q：调节哇音滤波器Q值
Mix：调节原声与效果音的混合比
Mode：选择用于吉他（Guitar）还是用于贝斯（Bass）
module.descriptionEn:
Control the wah sound by playing intensity. A wide range d envelope filter (a.k.a. touch wah) designed for guitarists and bassists  that is touch-sensitive and flexible.

Sense: Controls the effect sensitivity
Range: Controls the frequency range of the filter
Q: Controls the sharpness of the filter
Mix: Controls the wet/dry signal ratio
Mode: Selects from two modes: Guitar/Bass
module.summaryCn: 通过演奏力度控制的哇音音色。
module.summaryEn: Control the wah sound by playing intensity.

module.name: Crier
module.descriptionCn:
通过设定频率使哇音有规律地进行工作。提供多样的自动哇音（Auto Wah）效果，吉他和贝斯都可以使用。

Depth：控制效果深度
Rate：控制效果速度
VOL：控制效果音量
Low/High：控制效果低频/高频频点
Q：调节滤波器Q值
module.descriptionEn:
Set the rate to make the wah pedal work regularly. Providing a variable auto wah effect for both guitars and basses.

Depth: Controls the effect depth
Rate: Controls the effect speed
Volume: Controls the output level
Low: Controls the bottom point of center frequency (low freq)
Q: Controls the sharpness of the filter
High: Controls the top point of center frequency (high freq)

module.name: OCTA
module.descriptionCn:
提供自然的复音八度音效果。

Low：调节低八度效果音的音量
High：调节高八度效果音的音量
Dry：调节干信号的音量
module.descriptionEn:
Provides polyphonic octave effect.

Low: Controls the volume of lower octave (1 oct down)
High: Controls the volume of higher octave (1 oct up)
Dry: Controls the dry signal level

module.name: Pitch
module.descriptionCn:
提供自然的复音移调效果。

High：以半音为单位调节高音和声音高，最大+24（高2个八度）
Low：以半音为单位调节低音和声音高，最大-24（低2个八度）
Dry：调节干信号的音量
H-VOL：调节高音和声效果音量
L-VOL：调节低音和声效果音量
module.descriptionEn:
Polyphonic pitch shifter/harmonizer.

High/Low: Controls the high/low pitch shifting range by semitones 
Dry: Controls the dry signal level
H/L-VOL: Controls the high/low pitch volume

module.name: Detune
module.descriptionCn:
这是一款失谐效果，它将轻微移调的信号与原信号相结合，带来一种类似合唱的音色。

Detune：以1音分为单位调节失谐程度
Wet/Dry：控制效果音/原声音量大小
module.descriptionEn:
This is a detuning effect that combines a slightly shifted signal with the original signal to create a chorus-like tone.

Detune: Controls the detune amount from -50 to +50 cents
Dry/Wet: Controls the dry/wet signal level

module.name: Green OD
module.descriptionCn:
声音基于著名的Ibanez® TS-808 Tube Screamer®*过载/激励效果器音色。自1979年第一次展示在世界面前，TS808就开拓了一个新的世界。热爱它的吉他演奏家不胜枚举。它是一款温暖、细腻的过载效果器。可以作为过载使用，也可以作为Boost使用，适用的音乐风格极其广阔。

Gain：控制效果增益量
Tone：调节音色明亮度
VOL：调节效果音量

*文中所提到的厂商及产品名称仅用于直观说明该产品的效果与音色特性，商标名称归其公司所有。
module.descriptionEn:
Based on legenary Ibanez® TS-808 Tube Screamer®* overdrive pedal. Since it was first shown to the world in 1979, TS808 has opened up a new world. There are countless guitarists who love it. It is a warm, delicate overdrive effect.Can be used as either an overdrive or a Boost, can be used in a variety of musical styles.

Gain: Controls the overdrive amount
Tone: Controls the effect tone 
VOL: Controls the effect output

*The mentioned manufacturers and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of the respective owners. The trademarks were used merely to identify the sound character of this product.
module.summaryCn: 基于Ibanez® TS-808 Tube Screamer®*过载/激励效果器。
module.summaryEn: Based on Ibanez® TS-808 Tube Screamer®* overdrive pedal.

module.name: Yellow OD
module.descriptionCn:
1977年问世的它是一个经典的过载效果器。他的声音并不特别，但是很快成为了艺术家心中标准的过载音色。它的特点是一个不对称的电路，其中波形的正负半部分不均匀地失真。因此即使增加了失真，声音仍然接近原音。

Gain：控制效果增益量
Tone：调节音色明亮度
VOL：调节效果音量
module.descriptionEn:
Artist of the 70's was mostly using a fuzz distortion sound and the overdrive produced by it was not typical. It was however soon accepted as the new standard of guitar sound. It features an asymmetric circuit where the positive and negative halves of the waveform isn't distorted equally. The sound is therefore still close to the original even though distortion have been added. 

Gain: Controls the overdrive amount
Tone: Controls the effect tone 
VOL: Controls the effect output
module.summaryCn: 基于经典黄色双旋钮过载效果器。
module.summaryEn: Based on a classic yellow 2-knob overdrive pedal.

module.name: Super OD
module.descriptionCn:
独有的不对称过载效果电路，给传统的吉他音色加入了温暖悦耳的过载效果。

Gain：控制效果增益量
Tone：调节音色明亮度
VOL：调节效果音量
module.descriptionEn:
The unique asymmetric overdrive effect circuit adds warm and pleasant overdrive effect to the traditional guitar timbre.

Gain: Controls the overdrive amount
Tone: Controls the effect tone 
VOL: Controls the effect output
module.summaryCn: 基于经典黄色三旋钮过载效果器。
module.summaryEn: Based on a classic yellow 3-knob overdrive pedal.

module.name: SM Dist
module.descriptionCn:
它基于一块经典的橘色三旋钮失真效果器而来，可以用它轻易地得到70-80年代的音色特征。

Gain：控制效果增益量
Tone：调节音色明亮度
VOL：调节效果音量
module.descriptionEn:
It is based on a classic orange three-knob distortion effector, which can be used to easily get the timbre characteristics of the 70s-80s.

Gain: Controls the distortion amount
Tone: Controls the effect tone
VOL: Controls the effect output
module.summaryCn: 基于经典的橘色三旋钮失真效果器。
module.summaryEn: Based on a classic orange three-knob distortion pedal.

module.name: Plustortion
module.descriptionCn:
⾳色基于MXR® M104 Distortion +*经典失真单块（早期版本），它忠实还原了Randy Rhoads等众多摇滚乐手推崇的经典锗管失真音色。

Gain：控制效果增益量
VOL：调节效果音量

*文中所提到的厂商及产品名称仅用于直观说明该产品的效果与音色特性，商标名称归其公司所有。
module.descriptionEn:
This little yellow box has produced lots of great soundings in countless classic studio albums. Yeah, we're talking the legendary MXR® M104 Distortion +*, and this M104-based Plustortion. The Plustortion recreated the Germanium-powered soft clipping distortion, like what Randy Rhoads and other hard rockers do!

Gain: Controls the distortion amount
VOL: Controls the effect output

*The mentioned manufacturers and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of the respective owners. The trademarks were used merely to identify the sound character of this product.
module.summaryCn: 基于MXR® M104 Distortion +*失真单块。
module.summaryEn: Based on MXR® M104 Distortion +* distortion pedal.

module.name: La Charger
module.descriptionCn:
声音基于MI Audio® Crunch Box®*失真效果器，敏感而细腻的失真猛兽，它满足一切激情的Riff和Solo。各频段响应均衡，动态反馈忠实于指尖，即使在高增益下也可以很好的控制噪音。

Gain：控制效果增益量
Tone：调节音色明亮度
VOL：调节效果音量

*文中所提到的厂商及产品名称仅用于直观说明该产品的效果与音色特性，商标名称归其公司所有。
module.descriptionEn:
Based on MI Audio® Crunch Box®* distortion pedal. Sensitive and exquisite distortion beast, it satisfies all the passion of Riff and Solo.The response of each frequency band is balanced, the dynamic feedback is faithful to the fingertip, and the noise can be well controlled even at high gain.

Gain: Controls the distortion amount
Tone: Controls the effect tone
VOL: Controls the effect output

*The mentioned manufacturers and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of the respective owners. The trademarks were used merely to identify the sound character of this product.
module.summaryCn: 基于MI Audio® Crunch Box®*失真效果器。
module.summaryEn: Based on MI Audio® Crunch Box®* distortion pedal.

module.name: Darktale
module.descriptionCn:
声音基于ProCo™ The Rat*的失真效果，超大范围的Filter旋钮赋予了The Rat*生命，明亮紧凑的音头，饱满的音尾，强大的可塑性使它成为众多音乐人所爱。

Gain：控制效果增益量
Filter：控制音色明亮度（反向调节，与原版一致）VOL：调节效果音量

*文中所提到的厂商及产品名称仅用于直观说明该产品的效果与音色特性，商标名称归其公司所有。
module.descriptionEn:
Based on legendary ProCo™ The Rat* distortion (early LM308 OP-amp version). The Rat* has come to life thanks to its wide range of Filter knob, bright and compact sound head, full end and strong plasticity, making it a favorite of many musicians.

Gain: Controls the distortion amount
Filter: Counterclockwise controls the effect tone
VOL: Controls the effect output

*The mentioned manufacturers and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of the respective owners. The trademarks were used merely to identify the sound character of this product.
module.summaryCn: 基于ProCo™ The Rat*的失真效果。
module.summaryEn: Based on ProCo™ The Rat* distortion pedal.

module.name: Sora Fuzz
module.origin: Sola Sound Tone Bender Mk II
module.descriptionCn:
对于那些早期装置可能产生的激进锗管法兹的粉丝来说，没有什么比Sola法兹音色更好的了。 Sola Sound® Tone Bender*的电路大受欢迎，在随后的几年中，其设计迅速发展，形成了纠结而曲折的历史，与1960年代中期至70年代初英国最流行的音乐交织在一起。

Fuzz：控制效果增益量
VOL：控制效果音量

*文中所提到的厂商及产品名称仅用于直观说明该产品的效果与音色特性，商标名称归其公司所有。
module.descriptionEn:
Based on legendary Dallas-Arbiter® Fuzz Face®* fuzz pedal. Dallas Arbiter conjured the sound of rock and roll for half a century in 1966 with a few simple transistors. The sound of Fuzz Face was heavy and sharp, and its sound influenced countless famous musicians.

Fuzz: Controls the gain amount
VOL: Controls the effect output

*The mentioned manufacturers and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of the respective owners. The trademarks were used merely to identify the sound character of this product.
module.summaryCn: 基于Sola Sound® Tone Bender*的法兹效果。
module.summaryEn: Based on Sola Sound® Tone Bender* fuzz pedal.

module.name: Red Haze
module.descriptionCn:
声音基于传奇的Dallas-Arbiter® Fuzz Face®*法兹单块。在1966年，Dallas Arbiter利用几个简单的晶体管，如变魔术一般塑造出了影响摇滚乐半个世纪的声音，Fuzz Face的声音既厚重又尖锐，它的声音影响了无数著名的音乐人。

Fuzz：控制效果增益量
VOL：控制效果音量

*文中所提到的厂商及产品名称仅用于直观说明该产品的效果与音色特性，商标名称归其公司所有。
module.descriptionEn:
Based on legendary Dallas-Arbiter® Fuzz Face®* fuzz pedal. Dallas Arbiter conjured the sound of rock and roll for half a century in 1966 with a few simple transistors. The sound of Fuzz Face was heavy and sharp, and its sound influenced countless famous musicians.  

Fuzz: Controls the gain amount
VOL: Controls the effect output

*The mentioned manufacturers and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of the respective owners. The trademarks were used merely to identify the sound character of this product.
module.summaryCn: 基于Dallas-Arbiter® Fuzz Face®*法兹单块。
module.summaryEn: Based on Dallas-Arbiter® Fuzz Face®* fuzz pedal.

module.name: Bass OD
module.origin:
Boss ODB-3
XTOMP/Ampero Name: Bass Crusher
module.descriptionCn:
这是一款专门为贝司特有频率（包括五弦贝司）而设计的过载效果器，它把原有的贝司音色加上独特的过载效果，做出非常出色的失真效果，同时又保证了原有的贝司动态音色。它也可以用作为一个相当好的增益器。

Gain：控制效果增益量
Blend：调节信号的干湿比
VOL：控制效果音量
Bass/Treble：控制效果高/低频
module.descriptionEn:
This is an overdrive effect device specially designed for bass. It combines the original bass sound with a unique overdrive effect to make a very good distortion effect while ensuring The original bass dynamic tone. It can also be used as a pretty good boost.

Gain: Controls the distortion amount
Blend: Controls the wet/dry signal ratio
VOL: Controls the effect output
Bass/Treble: 2-band EQ that controls the effect tone
module.summaryCn: 为贝斯而设计的过载效果器。

module.name: Tweedy
module.descriptionCn:
基于Fender® Tweed Deluxe*的音箱模拟。这个放大器的触感具有从清晰和甜美的原声到野性过载动态范围，从乡村摇滚乐到失真，Fender® Tweed Deluxe* 已经在 60 多年的每个风格中成为了支柱。

Gain：调节音箱前级增益
Tone：调节音箱音色明亮度
VOL：调节效果输出音量

*文中所提到的厂商及产品名称仅用于直观说明该产品的效果与音色特性，商标名称归其公司所有。
module.descriptionEn:
Based on Fender® Tweed Deluxe*. This amplifier with a dynamic range from clean to wild overdrive, from country rock to distortion, the Fender® Tweed Deluxe* has been a totem in every style for more than 60 years.

Gain: Controls the gain amount (pre gain)
Tone: Controls the effect tone
VOL: Controls the output volume (post gain)

*The mentioned manufacturers and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of the respective owners. The trademarks were used merely to identify the sound character of this product.

module.name: Bellman 59N
module.descriptionCn:
基于Fender® '59 Bassman®* Normal通道的音箱模拟。流行音乐史上最充满戏剧性的一款音箱，原本为贝司设计，却成为了最为经典的吉他音箱。水一样清澈的清音，将电子管的动态发挥到了极致，是各大乐器厂商争相模仿的产品。

Gain：调节音箱前级增益
PRES：调节音箱音色临场度
VOL：调节效果输出音量
Bass/Middle/Treble：三段均衡调节音箱的低/中/高频响应

*文中所提到的厂商及产品名称仅用于直观说明该产品的效果与音色特性，商标名称归其公司所有。
module.descriptionEn:
Based on Fender® '59 Bassman®*. The most dramatic speaker in the history of Rock&Roll, originally designed for bass, has become the most classic guitar speaker. As clear as water, Vacuum tubemakes the sound more beautiful,make musical instrument manufacturers are eager to imitate the product.

Gain: Controls the gain amount (pre gain)
PRES: Controls the effect headroom 
VOL: Controls the output volume (post gain)
Bass/Middle/Treble: 3-band EQ that controls the effect tone

*The mentioned manufacturers and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of the respective owners. The trademarks were used merely to identify the sound character of this product.
module.summaryEn: Based on Fender® Bassman®* Normal CH.

module.name: Dark Twin
module.descriptionCn:
基于Fender® '65 Twin Reverb®* 的音箱模拟。接上一把Stratocaster*，无论乡村爵士还是摇滚乐，都能轻松还原最经典的音色。

Gain：调节音箱前级增益
VOL：调节音箱输出音量/后级增益
Bass/Middle/Treble：三段均衡调节音箱的低/中/高频响应

ENGL® Savage 120*放大器体现了ENGL*创造金属音色机器的丰富传统，该机器可以传递真实的音调，具有清晰的动态效果和丰富的声音种类。放大器的4声道布局具有令人难以置信的音调灵活性，它具有专用的Clean声道，两个独立的Crunch声道和一个超饱和的Lead声道，全部由两个离散的EQ和多种附加功能支持。

Gain：调节音箱前级增益
PRES：调节音箱音色临场度
VOL：调节效果输出音量
Bass/Middle/Treble：三段均衡调节音箱的低/中/高频响应

*文中所提到的厂商及产品名称仅用于直观说明该产品的效果与音色特性，商标名称归其公司所有。
module.descriptionEn:
ENGL® Savage 120* Amplifier embodies ENGL's rich legacy of creating metal machines for delivering truly punishing tones, with clear dynamics and tremendous sonic variety.
This incredible tonal flexibility comes from the 4 channel layout of the amp, with a dedicated Clean channel, two separate Crunch channels, and a super-saturated Lead channel, all supported by two discrete EQs and a wide selection of additional features.

Gain: Controls the gain amount (pre gain)
PRES: Controls the effect headroom 
VOL: Controls the output volume (post gain)
Bass/Middle/Treble: 3-band EQ that controls the effect tone

*The mentioned manufacturers and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of the respective owners. The trademarks were used merely to identify the sound character of this product.

module.name: Guitar EQ 1
module.descriptionCn:
为吉他设计的均衡。

125Hz、400Hz、800Hz、1.6kHz、4kHz：提升或衰减对应的频段
VOL：调节输出音量
module.descriptionEn:
Equalizer designed for guitars.

Band 1: 125Hz
Band 2: 400Hz 
Band 3: 800Hz
Band 4: 1.6kHz
Band 5: 4kHz
Use the five bands above to control the EQ level
VOL: Controls the output level

module.descriptionCn:
为吉他设计的均衡。

100Hz、500Hz、1kHz、3kHz、6kHz：提升或衰减对应的频段
VOL：调节输出音量

Equalizer designed for guitars.

Band 1: 100Hz
Band 2: 500Hz 
Band 3: 1kHz
Band 4: 3kHz
Band 5: 6kHz
Use the five bands above to control the EQ level
VOL: Controls the output level

module.name: Mess EQ
module.descriptionCn:
音色基于Mesa/Boogie®*⾳箱的均衡模块，可以让您轻松实现经典的boogie V形的均衡声响。

80Hz、240Hz、750Hz、2200Hz、6600Hz：提升或衰减对应的频段

*文中所提到的厂商及产品名称仅用于直观说明该产品的效果与音色特性，商标名称归其公司所有。
module.descriptionEn:
Based on the 5-band EQ module on Mesa/Boogie®* amps, can easily realize the classic boogie V-shaped sound.

Band 1: 80Hz
Band 2: 240Hz 
Band 3: 750Hz
Band 4: 2.2kHz
Band 5: 6.6kHz
Use the five bands above to control the EQ level

*The mentioned manufacturers and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of the respective owners. The trademarks were used merely to identify the sound character of this product.
module.summaryEn: Based on the 5-band EQ module on Mesa/Boogie®* amps.

module.name: A-Chorus
module.descriptionCn:
声音基于传奇的Arion® SCH-1*立体声合唱单块。Eric Clapton和Michael Landau用它的音色创造出了80年代的美妙氛围！无论是经典合唱效果还是美妙的旋转扬声器音色，你都可以轻松获得。

Depth：控制合唱效果深度
Rate：控制合唱效果速度
Tone：调节音色明亮度

*文中所提到的厂商及产品名称仅用于直观说明该产品的效果与音色特性，商标名称归其公司所有。
module.descriptionEn:
Based on legendary Arion® SCH-1* stereo chorus pedal. Eric Clapton and Michael Landau used its sound to create the wonderful atmosphere of the 80s! Whether it's the classic chorus effect or the wonderful rotating speaker sound, you can easily get it.

Depth: Controls the chorus depth
Rate: Controls the chorus rate
Tone: Controls the effect tone

*The mentioned manufacturers and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of the respective owners. The trademarks were used merely to identify the sound character of this product.
module.summaryEn: Based on Arion® SCH-1* chorus pedal.

module.name: B-Chorus
module.descriptionCn:
它基于⼀款标杆级别的经典贝斯合唱建模而来，能够带给你自然、纯正、丰富的合唱音⾊，并且独立的效果音量调节可以让声音的细节更加多样化。

Depth：控制合唱效果深度
Rate：控制合唱效果速度
VOL：调节效果音量
module.descriptionEn:
Based on the famous ensemble chorus unit tuned for bassists.

Depth: Controls the vibrato depth
Rate: Controls the vibrato rate
VOL: Controls the effect level
module.summaryEn: Based on a famous bass chorus unit.

module.name: Jet
module.descriptionCn:
经典的镶边效果，产生丰富、自然的镶边音色。

Depth：控制效果深度
Rate：控制效果速度
P.Delay：控制预延迟时间
F.Back：调节效果反馈量
module.descriptionEn:
Classic flanger effect, producing rich and natural flanger tone.

Depth: Controls the flanger depth
Rate: Controls the flanger speed
P.Delay: Controls the pre delay time
F.Back: Controls the amount of feedback

module.name: N-Jet
module.descriptionCn:
这是一款带有负反馈的镶边效果器，可产生“水下”风格的声音。

Depth：控制效果深度
Rate：控制效果速度
P.Delay：控制预延迟时间
F.Back：调节效果反馈量
module.descriptionEn:
A flanger with negative feedback, producing "underwater" style sound.

Depth: Controls the flanger depth
Rate: Controls the flanger speed
P.Delay: Controls the pre delay time
F.Back Controls the amount of feedback
module.summaryCn: 带有负反馈的镶边效果。

module.name: O-Phase
module.descriptionCn:
声音基于鼎鼎⼤名的MXR® M101 Phase 90*相位效果器。听过Eddie Van Halen《Eruption》中的吉他音色么？那个带有旋转感的失真音色就是利用Phase 90实现的。

Rate：调节效果的速度

*文中所提到的厂商及产品名称仅用于直观说明该产品的效果与音色特性，商标名称归其公司所有。
module.descriptionEn:
Based on legendary MXR® M101 Phase 90*. Have you heard the guitar sound in Eddie Van Halen's "Eruption"? That distorted tone with a sense of rotation is realized by Phase 90.


Rate: Controls the effect speed

*The mentioned manufacturers and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of the respective owners. The trademarks were used merely to identify the sound character of this product.
module.summaryCn: 基于MXR® M101 Phase 90*相位效果器。

module.name: M-Vibe
module.descriptionCn:
声音基于传奇的 Voodoo Lab® Micro Vibe*的旋转扬声器效果。Voodoo Lab Micro Vibe具有与原版1968 Uni-Vibe*相同的设计。Jimi Hendrix和Stevie Ray Vaughan在专辑中大量使用这类效果。Vibe效果会带来轻微的有规律音高变化。

Depth：调节效果的深度
Rate：调节效果的速度

*文中所提到的厂商及产品名称仅用于直观说明该产品的效果与音色特性，商标名称归其公司所有。
module.descriptionEn:
Based on Voodoo Lab® Micro Vibe*. Voodoo Lab Micro Vibe has the same design as the original 1968 Uni-Vibe*. Jimi Hendrix and Stevie Ray Vaughan used these effects extensively in their albums. The Vibe effect will bring about slight and regular pitch changes.

Depth: Controls the effect depth
Rate: Controls the effect speed

*The mentioned manufacturers and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of the respective owners. The trademarks were used merely to identify the sound character of this product.
module.summaryCn: 基于 Voodoo Lab® Micro Vibe*旋转扬声器效果。
module.summaryEn: Based on Voodoo Lab® Micro Vibe*.

module.name: V-Roto
module.descriptionCn:
声音基于⼀款经典的BBD模拟颤音单块效果器的声音。

Depth：调节效果的深度
Rate：调节效果的速度
module.descriptionEn:
Based on a BBD-based blue vibrato pedal, producing natural analog vibrato sound.

Depth: Controls the vibrato depth
Rate: Controls the vibrato rate
module.summaryCn: 基于BBD模拟颤音单块效果器。
module.summaryEn: Based on a BBD-based blue vibrato pedal.

module.name: Vibrato
module.descriptionCn:
该模型是典型的颤音效果，具有广泛的可控范围。

Depth：调节效果的深度
Rate：调节效果的速度
VOL：调节效果音量
module.descriptionEn:
A classic vibrato effect with wide adjustable range.

Depth: Controls the vibrato depth
Rate: Controls the vibrato speed
VOL: Controls the effect level

module.name: O-Trem
module.descriptionCn:
声音基于传奇的Demeter® TRM-1 Tremulator*的光学震音（Tremolo）效果。1982年，摇滚先驱Ry Cooder找到James Demeter询问是否可以把Fender® twin系列音箱的颤音音色做成踏板效果器，于是这块经典的效果器便诞生了。

Depth：调节震音的深度
Rate：调节震音的速度

*文中所提到的厂商及产品名称仅用于直观说明该产品的效果与音色特性，商标名称归其公司所有。
module.descriptionEn:
Based on legendary Demeter® TRM-1Tremulator*, offering classical opto tremolo sound. In 1982, rock pioneer Ry Cooder approached James Demeter to ask whether the tremolo sound of the Fender® twin series speakers could be made into a pedal effect device, and this classic effect device was born.

Depth: Controls the tremolo depth
Rate: Controls the tremolo speed

*The mentioned manufacturers and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of the respective owners. The trademarks were used merely to identify the sound character of this product.
module.summaryCn: 基于Demeter® TRM-1 Tremulator*光学震音。
module.summaryEn: Based on Demeter® TRM-1Tremulator* tremolo sound.

module.name: Sine Trem
module.descriptionCn:
有着宽广调节范围的正弦波震音。

Depth：调节效果的深度
Rate：调节效果的速度
VOL：控制输出音量
module.descriptionEn:
Sine tremolo waveforms and super wide tonal range.

Depth: Controls the effect depth
Rate: Controls the effect speed
VOL: Controls the effect output

module.name: Bias Trem
module.descriptionCn:
通过调节偏置电压来创造一种独特的震音效果。

Depth：调节效果的深度
Rate：调节效果的速度
VOL：控制输出音量
Bias：调节波形的偏移变化
module.descriptionEn:
Bias tremolo waveforms and super wide tonal range.

Depth: Controls the effect depth
Rate: Controls the effect speed
VOL: Controls the effect output
Bias：Adjust the offset change of the waveform
module.summaryCn: 调节偏置电压创造的震音效果。

module.name: Pure
module.descriptionCn:
产生纯净精准的延迟音色。

Mix：调节原声与效果音的混合比
Time：调节延迟时间
F.Back：调节延迟反馈量
Trail：效果尾音保留开关，打开此开关在效果关闭后效果尾音会自然衰减而不是直接消失
module.descriptionEn:
Produce pure, precised delay sound.

Mix: Controls the wet/dry signal ratio
Time: Controls the delay time 
F.Back: Controls the amount of feedback
Trail: Switched effect trail on/off when the effect is bypassed

module.name: Analog
module.descriptionCn:
产生温暖的模拟延迟风格音色。

Mix：调节原声与效果音的混合比
Time：调节延迟时间
F.Back：调节延迟反馈量
Trail：效果尾音保留开关，打开此开关在效果关闭后效果尾音会自然衰减而不是直接消失
module.descriptionEn:
Produciing warm delay sound with analog feel.

Mix: Controls the wet/dry signal ratio
Time: Controls the delay time 
F.Back: Controls the amount of feedback
Trail: Switched effect trail on/off when the effect is bypassed
module.summaryEn: Warm delay sound with analog feel.

module.name: Slapback
module.descriptionCn:
模拟经典的Slapback延迟效果。

Mix：调节原声与效果音的混合比
Time：调节延迟时间
F.Back：调节延迟反馈量
Trail：效果尾音保留开关，打开此开关在效果关闭后效果尾音会自然衰减而不是直接消失
module.descriptionEn:
Simulates the classic slapback echo effect.

Mix: Controls the wet/dry signal ratio
Time: Controls the delay time 
F.Back: Controls the amount of feedback
Trail: Switched effect trail on/off when the effect is bypassed

module.name: Sweet Echo
module.descriptionCn:
这款模拟延迟踏板在1981年至1984年之间出售，由于其温暖自然的声音仍受到追捧。原版仅产生20到300毫秒的延迟时间。

Mix：调节原声与效果音的混合比
Time：调节延迟时间
F.Back：调节延迟反馈量
Trail：效果尾音保留开关，打开此开关在效果关闭后效果尾音会自然衰减而不是直接消失
module.descriptionEn:
This analog delay pedal was sold from 1981 to 1984 and is still sought after thanks to its warm, natural sound. The original only produced a delay time ranging from 20 to 300 milliseconds.

Mix: Controls the wet/dry signal ratio
Time: Controls the delay time 
F.Back: Controls the amount of feedback
Trail: Switched effect trail on/off when the effect is bypassed
module.summaryCn: 基于一款模拟延迟踏板。
module.summaryEn: Based on an analog delay pedal.

module.name: Tape
module.descriptionCn:
模拟晶体管磁带延迟音色。

Mix：调节原声与效果音的混合比
Time：调节延迟时间
F.Back：调节延迟反馈量
Trail：效果尾音保留开关，打开此开关在效果关闭后效果尾音会自然衰减而不是直接消失
module.descriptionEn:
Simulates solid-state tape echo sound.

Mix: Controls the wet/dry signal ratio
Time: Controls the delay time 
F.Back: Controls the amount of feedback
Trail: Switched effect trail on/off when the effect is bypassed

module.name: Tube
module.descriptionCn:
模拟电子管磁带延迟音色。

Mix：调节原声与效果音的混合比
Time：调节延迟时间
F.Back：调节延迟反馈量
Trail：效果尾音保留开关，打开此开关在效果关闭后效果尾音会自然衰减而不是直接消失
module.descriptionEn:
Simulates tube-driven tape echo sound.

Mix: Controls the wet/dry signal ratio
Time: Controls the delay time 
F.Back: Controls the amount of feedback
Trail: Switched effect trail on/off when the effect is bypassed

module.name: Rev Echo
module.descriptionCn:
这是⼀种可以反向播放原声的延迟效果。

Mix：调节原声与效果音的混合比
Time：调节延迟时间
F.Back：调节延迟反馈量
Trail：效果尾音保留开关，打开此开关在效果关闭后效果尾音会自然衰减而不是直接消失
module.descriptionEn:
Producing a special delay effect with reversed feedback.

Mix: Controls the wet/dry signal ratio
Time: Controls the delay time 
F.Back: Controls the amount of feedback
Trail: Switched effect trail on/off when the effect is bypassed

module.name: Ring Echo
module.descriptionCn:
产生带有环形调制音色的延迟效果。

Mix：调节原声与延迟效果音的混合比
Time：调节延迟时间
F.Back：调节延迟反馈量
R-Mix：调节原声与调制效果音的混合比
Freq：调节调制频率
Tone：调节调制效果音色明亮度
Trail：效果尾音保留开关，打开此开关在效果关闭后效果尾音会自然衰减而不是直接消失
module.descriptionEn:
Producing a delay effect with ring modulated repeats.

Mix: Controls the delay wet/dry signal ratio
Time: Controls the delay time 
F.Back: Controls the amount of feedback
R-Mix: Controls the ring mod wet/dry signal ratio
Freq: Controls the ring mod frequency 
Tone: Controls the ring mod tone
Trail: Switched effect trail on/off when the effect is bypassed

module.name: Sweep Echo
module.descriptionCn:
产生带有扫频滤波器调制的延迟效果。
